requirement_topic.en: T&TEC Grid Interconnection — 60 Hz Anti-Islanding, Ride-Through, and 115/230 V Settings
requirement_topic.zh: T&TEC并网——60 Hz防孤岛、穿越及115/230 V参数
requirement_topic.zht: T&TEC併網——60 Hz防孤島、穿越及115/230 V參數

summary.en: Trinidad and Tobago's electricity supply is a 60 Hz system with US-heritage NEMA service characteristics and common low-voltage supply around 115/230 V. T&TEC is the electricity utility and interconnection counterparty for grid-tied PV projects, while RIC regulates the electricity sector. For PV inverters, project submissions should treat the market as an Americas 60 Hz interconnection environment: anti-islanding, voltage and frequency trip thresholds, reconnection delay, ride-through behavior, harmonic limits, and protection coordination must be configured and validated for the actual T&TEC point of interconnection. The likely technical direction is IEEE 1547 and UL 1741 style grid-support and certification evidence, supplemented by IEC 62116 and IEC 61727 where specified, not a 50 Hz Europe-style EN 50549 or VDE-only package.
summary.zh: 特立尼达和多巴哥电力供应为60 Hz系统，具有美国体系渊源的NEMA供电特征，常见低压供电约为115/230 V。T&TEC是并网光伏项目的电力公用事业和互联相对方，RIC负责电力行业监管。对于光伏逆变器，项目提交应将该市场视为美洲60 Hz并网环境：防孤岛、电压和频率跳闸阈值、重连延迟、穿越行为、谐波限值和保护配合，均须针对实际T&TEC并网点进行配置和验证。可能的技术方向是IEEE 1547和UL 1741式电网支撑及认证证据，并在要求时补充IEC 62116和IEC 61727，而非仅提交50 Hz欧洲式EN 50549或VDE文件包。
summary.zht: 千里達及托巴哥電力供應為60 Hz系統，具有美國體系淵源的NEMA供電特徵，常見低壓供電約為115/230 V。T&TEC是併網光伏項目的電力公用事業和互聯相對方，RIC負責電力行業監管。對於光伏逆變器，項目提交應將該市場視為美洲60 Hz併網環境：防孤島、電壓和頻率跳閘閾值、重連延遲、穿越行為、諧波限值和保護配合，均須針對實際T&TEC併網點進行配置和驗證。可能的技術方向是IEEE 1547和UL 1741式電網支撐及認證證據，並在要求時補充IEC 62116和IEC 61727，而非僅提交50 Hz歐洲式EN 50549或VDE文件包。

standards_or_laws: T&TEC (Trinidad and Tobago Electricity Commission) — utility interconnection counterparty for grid-tied electricity projects
RIC (Regulated Industries Commission) — electricity-sector regulator for Trinidad and Tobago
IEEE 1547 — Standard for Interconnection and Interoperability of Distributed Energy Resources with Associated Electric Power Systems Interfaces (likely Americas-direction reference)
UL 1741 — Inverters, Converters, Controllers and Interconnection System Equipment for Use With Distributed Energy Resources (may be requested for NEMA/US-heritage projects)
IEC 62116 — Utility-interconnected photovoltaic inverters — Test procedure of islanding prevention measures
IEC 61727 — Photovoltaic systems — Characteristics of the utility interface

summary.en: Chinese grid-connection evidence commonly includes GB/T 19964-2024, NB/T 32004, GB/T 37408-2021, domestic anti-islanding tests, and factory firmware profiles for China's 50 Hz / 220-380 V grid. These documents do not automatically demonstrate compliance with T&TEC's 60 Hz service context or an IEEE 1547 / UL 1741 style interconnection review. The mismatch is both frequency and voltage: protection algorithms, magnetics, thermal assumptions, anti-islanding detection, ride-through curves, and relay settings validated for 50 Hz China operation must be revalidated for 60 Hz Trinidad and Tobago operation.
summary.zh: 中国并网证据通常包括GB/T 19964-2024、NB/T 32004、GB/T 37408-2021、国内防孤岛测试以及针对中国50 Hz / 220-380 V电网的出厂固件配置。这些文件不能自动证明符合T&TEC 60 Hz供电背景或IEEE 1547 / UL 1741式并网审查。差异同时涉及频率和电压：针对中国50 Hz运行验证的保护算法、磁性器件、热设计假设、防孤岛检测、穿越曲线和继电器整定，须针对特立尼达和多巴哥60 Hz运行重新验证。
summary.zht: 中國併網證據通常包括GB/T 19964-2024、NB/T 32004、GB/T 37408-2021、國內防孤島測試以及針對中國50 Hz / 220-380 V電網的出廠韌體配置。這些文件不能自動證明符合T&TEC 60 Hz供電背景或IEEE 1547 / UL 1741式併網審查。差異同時涉及頻率和電壓：針對中國50 Hz運行驗證的保護算法、磁性器件、熱設計假設、防孤島檢測、穿越曲線和繼電器整定，須針對千里達及托巴哥60 Hz運行重新驗證。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 19964-2024 — 光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定 (Technical Requirements for Connecting Photovoltaic Power Station to Power System) — China 50 Hz context
NB/T 32004-2018 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters) — China 50 Hz context
GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters) — China 50 Hz context
GB/T 156 — 标准电压 (Standard voltages) — China grid: 220/380 V at 50 Hz

gap.en: Gap: Chinese 50 Hz grid certificates and default protection profiles do not transfer to Trinidad and Tobago. Exporters should prepare: (a) evidence that the exact inverter model supports 60 Hz operation and the required 115/230 V or project-specific AC configuration; (b) anti-islanding evidence at 60 Hz, preferably aligned with IEEE 1547 / UL 1741 direction where requested by the project or T&TEC; (c) ride-through, reactive-power, harmonic, and power-quality documentation for the T&TEC point of interconnection; (d) a firmware settings sheet showing voltage, frequency, trip, reconnection, and anti-islanding parameters; (e) project-specific confirmation from T&TEC and the licensed local engineer before commissioning.
gap.zh: 差距：中国50 Hz并网证书和默认保护配置不能转移至特立尼达和多巴哥。出口商应准备：（a）证明特定逆变器型号支持60 Hz运行以及所需115/230 V或项目特定交流配置的证据；（b）60 Hz条件下的防孤岛证据，并在项目或T&TEC要求时优先与IEEE 1547 / UL 1741方向一致；（c）针对T&TEC并网点的穿越、无功功率、谐波和电能质量文件；（d）显示电压、频率、跳闸、重连和防孤岛参数的固件设置表；（e）调试前取得T&TEC和持证本地工程师的项目特定确认。
gap.zht: 差距：中國50 Hz併網證書和預設保護配置不能轉移至千里達及托巴哥。出口商應準備：（a）證明特定逆變器型號支持60 Hz運行以及所需115/230 V或項目特定交流配置的證據；（b）60 Hz條件下的防孤島證據，並在項目或T&TEC要求時優先與IEEE 1547 / UL 1741方向一致；（c）針對T&TEC併網點的穿越、無功功率、諧波和電能品質文件；（d）顯示電壓、頻率、跳閘、重連和防孤島參數的韌體設置表；（e）調試前取得T&TEC和持證本地工程師的項目特定確認。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where a PV inverter is interconnected to the T&TEC grid; exact tests, settings, and acceptance path depend on project size, voltage, point of interconnection, and T&TEC/RIC/project-owner review
mandatory_status.cn: Chinese 50 Hz grid-connection evidence satisfies China domestic grid and certification needs only; it is not a substitute for T&TEC interconnection acceptance

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat Trinidad and Tobago as a 60 Hz Americas/NEMA grid market. Chinese 50 Hz / 220-380 V grid evidence should be treated as background only. Revalidate anti-islanding, ride-through, protection settings, and AC ratings for the actual T&TEC point of interconnection, and expect IEEE 1547 / UL 1741 style evidence where the project or utility requests it.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 应将特立尼达和多巴哥视为60 Hz美洲/NEMA电网市场。中国50 Hz / 220-380 V并网证据仅宜作为背景资料。须针对实际T&TEC并网点重新验证防孤岛、穿越、保护整定和交流额定值，并在项目或公用事业要求时预期提供IEEE 1547 / UL 1741式证据。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 應將千里達及托巴哥視為60 Hz美洲/NEMA電網市場。中國50 Hz / 220-380 V併網證據僅宜作為背景資料。須針對實際T&TEC併網點重新驗證防孤島、穿越、保護整定和交流額定值，並在項目或公用事業要求時預期提供IEEE 1547 / UL 1741式證據。

requirement_topic.en: RIC / Project Approval Context — Utility, Distributed, and Oil-and-Gas Economy Power Projects
requirement_topic.zh: RIC / 项目审批背景——公用事业、分布式及油气经济电力项目
requirement_topic.zht: RIC / 項目審批背景——公用事業、分散式及油氣經濟電力項目

summary.en: Trinidad and Tobago's power sector operates in a regulated utility context, with RIC overseeing regulated electricity services and T&TEC as the state utility. The market is also shaped by a Caribbean oil-and-gas economy, industrial loads, and project-specific procurement specifications for public, commercial, industrial, and possible utility-scale solar projects. PV inverter acceptance therefore depends on the route: T&TEC grid connection, RIC-regulated electricity service obligations, public procurement terms, industrial-site engineering requirements, and any TTBS conformity expectations. Oil-and-gas-sector electrical specifications may request NEMA, UL, IEEE, surge protection, grounding, tropical corrosion, and service-continuity evidence in addition to baseline IEC reports.
summary.zh: 特立尼达和多巴哥电力行业处于受监管公用事业背景下，RIC监管受管电力服务，T&TEC为国有公用事业。该市场还受加勒比油气经济、工业负荷以及公共、商业、工业和可能的公用事业规模太阳能项目的项目特定采购规格影响。因此，光伏逆变器能否被接受取决于项目路径：T&TEC并网、RIC监管的电力服务义务、公共采购条款、工业场址工程要求以及任何TTBS合格评定期望。油气行业电气规格除基础IEC报告外，可能要求NEMA、UL、IEEE、防浪涌、接地、热带腐蚀和服务连续性证据。
summary.zht: 千里達及托巴哥電力行業處於受監管公用事業背景下，RIC監管受管電力服務，T&TEC為國有公用事業。該市場還受加勒比油氣經濟、工業負荷以及公共、商業、工業和可能的公用事業規模太陽能項目的項目特定採購規格影響。因此，光伏逆變器能否被接受取決於項目路徑：T&TEC併網、RIC監管的電力服務義務、公共採購條款、工業場址工程要求以及任何TTBS合格評定期望。油氣行業電氣規格除基礎IEC報告外，可能要求NEMA、UL、IEEE、防浪湧、接地、熱帶腐蝕和服務連續性證據。

standards_or_laws: RIC (Regulated Industries Commission) — regulator for electricity and other regulated utility services
T&TEC (Trinidad and Tobago Electricity Commission) — electricity utility and grid interconnection counterparty
TTBS (Trinidad and Tobago Bureau of Standards) — national standards body and conformity-assessment reference point
Project-specific employer's requirements for public, commercial, industrial, oil-and-gas, or utility solar procurements

summary.en: China's distributed and utility PV approvals are governed by Chinese energy policy, grid company connection rules, and domestic technical standards such as NB/T 32004, GB/T 37408, and GB/T 19964. These are useful for describing a manufacturer's China track record but do not establish eligibility for Trinidad and Tobago public tenders, industrial projects, T&TEC interconnection, or TTBS conformity review. China domestic certificates also usually do not address NEMA hardware expectations, UL 1741 listing requests, or 60 Hz oil-and-gas industrial electrical documentation.
summary.zh: 中国分布式和公用事业光伏审批受中国能源政策、电网企业接入规则以及NB/T 32004、GB/T 37408、GB/T 19964等国内技术标准管理。这些资料有助于说明制造商在中国的项目经验，但不构成特立尼达和多巴哥公共招标、工业项目、T&TEC并网或TTBS合格评定审查的资格证明。中国国内证书通常也不覆盖NEMA硬件期望、UL 1741列名要求或60 Hz油气工业电气文件。
summary.zht: 中國分散式和公用事業光伏審批受中國能源政策、電網企業接入規則以及NB/T 32004、GB/T 37408、GB/T 19964等國內技術標準管理。這些資料有助於說明製造商在中國的項目經驗，但不構成千里達及托巴哥公共招標、工業項目、T&TEC併網或TTBS合格評定審查的資格證明。中國國內證書通常也不覆蓋NEMA硬體期望、UL 1741列名要求或60 Hz油氣工業電氣文件。

standards_or_laws: NB/T 32004-2018 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
GB/T 19964-2024 — 光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定 (Technical Requirements for Connecting Photovoltaic Power Station to Power System)

gap.en: Gap: Chinese project approvals and domestic certificates do not establish acceptance under Trinidad and Tobago project, utility, or industrial requirements. Tender and interconnection files should map each inverter model to T&TEC grid settings, 60 Hz test evidence, IEEE 1547 / UL 1741 or IEC evidence requested by the project, tropical-environment ratings, NEMA-compatible AC hardware where required, surge and grounding design, spare-parts and service commitments, and any TTBS import or conformity expectations. Industrial and oil-and-gas sites may impose more stringent electrical and reliability documentation than standard distributed PV projects.
gap.zh: 差距：中国项目批准和国内证书不能证明符合特立尼达和多巴哥项目、公用事业或工业要求。投标和并网文件应将每个逆变器型号对应至T&TEC电网设置、60 Hz测试证据、项目要求的IEEE 1547 / UL 1741或IEC证据、热带环境额定值、需要时与NEMA兼容的交流硬件、防浪涌和接地设计、备件及服务承诺，以及任何TTBS进口或合格评定期望。工业和油气场址可能提出比标准分布式光伏项目更严格的电气和可靠性文件要求。
gap.zht: 差距：中國項目批准和國內證書不能證明符合千里達及托巴哥項目、公用事業或工業要求。投標和併網文件應將每個逆變器型號對應至T&TEC電網設置、60 Hz測試證據、項目要求的IEEE 1547 / UL 1741或IEC證據、熱帶環境額定值、需要時與NEMA相容的交流硬體、防浪湧和接地設計、備件及服務承諾，以及任何TTBS進口或合格評定期望。工業和油氣場址可能提出比標準分散式光伏項目更嚴格的電氣和可靠性文件要求。

mandatory_status.target: Project-dependent; mandatory where stated in T&TEC interconnection conditions, RIC-regulated service requirements, public procurement documents, industrial employer's requirements, or TTBS import/conformity procedures
mandatory_status.cn: Chinese programme approvals and domestic project references are not transferable to Trinidad and Tobago

source.publisher: Regulated Industries Commission (RIC), Trinidad and Tobago

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Trinidad and Tobago project route matters. Separate T&TEC grid-tied submissions from RIC-regulated service issues, TTBS conformity questions, public procurement, and industrial or oil-and-gas employer requirements. Do not present China project approvals as a substitute for local 60 Hz, NEMA/UL/IEEE, TTBS, RIC, or T&TEC documentation.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 特立尼达和多巴哥的项目路径很关键。应区分T&TEC并网提交、RIC监管服务事项、TTBS合格评定问题、公共采购以及工业或油气业主要求。不得将中国项目批准作为当地60 Hz、NEMA/UL/IEEE、TTBS、RIC或T&TEC文件的替代。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 千里達及托巴哥的項目路徑很關鍵。應區分T&TEC併網提交、RIC監管服務事項、TTBS合格評定問題、公共採購以及工業或油氣業主要求。不得將中國項目批准作為當地60 Hz、NEMA/UL/IEEE、TTBS、RIC或T&TEC文件的替代。
